runners.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 0.8 lengths second but did record a respectable 18.81 over the 330m journey. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 0.8 lengths second but did record a respectable 18.81 over the 330m journey. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered at the turn out of the back straight.
Raced wide on the home turn and lost momentum.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th on April 8 over 330m at this track behind Peppa's Daughter beaten 3.5 lengths (19.01) in a Grade 3/4. Placed two back at this track. Is a danger.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th on April 8 over 330m at this track behind Peppa's Daughter beaten 3.5 lengths (19.01) in a Grade 3/4. Placed two back at this track. Is a danger.

runners.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins together. Had plenty of support last start when she won easily by 4 lengths at this track (18.48) beating Let's Go Out in a Grade 4 on April 1. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins together. Had plenty of support last start when she won easily by 4 lengths at this track (18.48) beating Let's Go Out in a Grade 4 on April 1. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

runners.formComment: In the money last time at Gosford (22.33) in a NG, finishing a 0.8 lengths second. Has two wins and two placings from seven starts from the draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at Gosford (22.33) in a NG, finishing a 0.8 lengths second. Has two wins and two placings from seven starts from the draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Entering the back straight, galloped onto the hind quarters.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Dubbo over 318m in 18.40. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 318m at Dubbo at Grade 4/5 level. Will be tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Dubbo over 318m in 18.40. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 318m at Dubbo at Grade 4/5 level. Will be tested in this company.

runners.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (18.79) over 320m at Wagga. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (18.79) over 320m at Wagga. Prefer others.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 330m (18.91) beating Irinka Fred in Grade 5 on April 8. Can't recommend against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 2.25 lengths at this track over 330m (18.91) beating Irinka Fred in Grade 5 on April 8. Can't recommend against this lot.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 330m. Last start finished 3rd over 330m at this track beaten 6 lengths (19.00) behind Blaine Keeping in a NG on April 1. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on his best form.
